user.description: Connect to the GitHub Copilot Bridge Addon. Install and start the add-on first, then enter its URL below. For more information, visit the [documentation]({documentation_url}).

data_description.cli_url: URL of the GitHub Copilot Bridge Addon server. Default: http://github-copilot-bridge:7681 — this is set by the add-on's fixed hostname. Only change this if you customized the hostname.
data_description.model: Select the model to use. If the chosen model isn't available on your account, the first available model will be used automatically — you can change it anytime via Configure.
data_description.mcp_url: Optional: SSE URL of a running ha-mcp addon. Check the ha-mcp Logs tab for your unique URL — it looks like http://192.168.1.x:9583/private_AbCd1234... and is stable (never changes after first start). Leave blank to skip.

reconfigure.description: Update the URL of the GitHub Copilot Bridge Addon. Use this if the add-on hostname changed. The fixed hostname is {default_url} — try that first.

data_description.cli_url: URL of the GitHub Copilot Bridge Addon server. Current value: {current_url}. The fixed hostname is {default_url}.

error.required: Add-on URL is required. Enter the URL of the running GitHub Copilot Bridge Addon.
error.auth: Authentication failed. Check that the GitHub token set in the add-on options is valid and has Copilot permissions.
error.connection: Unable to connect to the GitHub Copilot Bridge Addon. Ensure it is installed, running, and the URL is correct (e.g. {default_url}).
error.invalid_url: Invalid URL. Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS address for the GitHub Copilot Bridge Addon (e.g. {default_url}).
error.model_unavailable: That model is not available on your Copilot account. The list has been updated — please select an available model.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: GitHub Copilot Bridge Integration is already configured. Only one instance is allowed.

data_description.model: Models marked ✓ are included in paid Copilot plans (no premium request cost). Others draw from your monthly premium-request allowance — see github.com/features/copilot/plans for current multipliers.
data_description.mcp_url: Optional: URL of a running ha-mcp addon. Check the ha-mcp Logs tab for your unique URL — it looks like http://192.168.1.x:9583/private_AbCd1234... and is stable (never changes). Leave blank to skip.
data_description.instructions: Optional: System instructions injected at session start. Controls the agent's role, behaviour, and how it uses tools. When an MCP URL is set, a default is pre-filled for a heavy-task agent that uses ha-mcp (tool search ON) and saves results to HA helper entities. Clear and save to reset to this default.
